creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #4)

The consumer ports listed in pkg-message contains duplicate content.
It might be convenient to put these in one place.

The following three environment variables are included in the environment variables that this message tries to have us define.

XIM, XIM_PROGRAM and XIM_ARGS

These seem to be used in Linux startup scripts, but I can't find where they are used in FreeBSD.
I would like to see a basis for defining these.

This message tries to get you to define environment variables in various places, but it seems that ibus can only work if dbus is running first, so ~/.xinitrc is the most preferred location.

Perhaps this is how it should be, but we need input from others who use ibus.
